privileged_info_summary: The task requires arranging three distinct character poses (frames 1, 4, and 7) from the official OpenToonz sample 'dwanko_run.tnz' side-by-side. The verified output path is '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/pose_sheet/poses.png' with a strictly enforced resolution of 1920x1080. A non-empty rendered 1080p frame image of three character sprites is expected to comfortably exceed 50 KB in file size.
